# gainMetaParameter

**Instance Property**

A parameter that changes the mixer’s volume gradually over a period of time.

## Declaration

```swift
var gainMetaParameter: PHASEMetaParameter? { get }
```

## Discussion

Use this property to smoothly adjust the volume of the mixer’s audio signals by calling [doc://com.apple.phase/documentation/PHASE/PHASENumberMetaParameter/fade(value:duration:)].

The framework sets the initial value of this property according to the metaparameter definition object’s [doc://com.apple.phase/documentation/PHASE/PHASEMixerDefinition/gainMetaParameterDefinition].

## Adjusting Volume

- **gain**: The mixer’s volume.
title: gainMetaParameter
